title: Pure Functions, Immutability, and Data Copies · Pipeline Brief: Mutation Aliasing
summary: Repair a pricing pipeline where aliases mutate shared orders during validation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp mutation aliasing increment in a pure price transformation with alias-safety tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict mutation through shared aliases in nested Python containers.
Write deterministic pure functions whose outputs and failures depend only on explicit inputs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
